[ripping...    ]  -  [  2.93M]

Song title should be between the brackets ]  -  [ above. Because its not the song
file is written to " - .mp3" and when all songs have same name only the first is saved.

Fix: 

Don't know how to fix.
http://code.google.com/p/xstreamripper/ on MacOS X correctly finds StreamTitles.
